Class: LTIRegistrationController

controllers/lti-register.js~LTIRegistrationController(provider_config, models, logger, domain_name, admin_email, consumer_controller)

new LTIRegistrationController(provider_config, models, logger, domain_name, admin_email, consumer_controller)

LTI Registration Controller
Parameters:
Name Type Description
provider_config Object the provider configuration object from the main config file
models Object the LTI toolkit models
logger Object the logger instance
domain_name string the domain name of the application (e.g., "https://example.com")
admin_email string the admin email address (e.g., "admin@domain.tld")
consumer_controller Object the consumer controller instance (used for database operations related to consumers)
Source:
  • controllers/lti-register.js, line 29

(async) dynamicRegistration(query)

LTI 1.3 Dyanamic Registration Handler

Name Type Description
query Object the query parameters from the request

if there is an error during the registration process
